criminal_summary.case_numbers_xls: FIR No. 225/2025, Kayarlabath Police Station, Ariyalur Taluk, Ariyalur District. Sections: Under THE BHARATIYA NYAYA SANHITA (BNS), 2023, U/S. 189(2), 126(2) and 329(3). Brief description: Protest Conducting by political party with group persons unauthorized and forcefully entered into mines of Amalgamated Periyanagalur, Aminabad and Kayarlabath Limestone Mines belonging to Dalmia cement (B) Limited. Asthinapurama, Manakudi Salai, Ariyalur District. Charges framed: NO. Appeal/Application for revision: Yes, Honorable Madras High Court granted Stay to hearing the case.
